Records.description: 3-loop traintrack integral involving a K3 surface. 3-loop traintrack with 10 massless propagators, 12 massless external legs grouped into 8 momenta. Finite and dual-conformally invariant in d=4. Involves weight-4 hyperlogarithms integrated over a K3 surface, realized as a degree-12 hypersurface in weighted projective space P^3_[1:1:4:6]. The K3 is a smooth semi-stable elliptic surface of Picard number 2 with Weierstrass discriminant of degree 24 in the fiber parameter. Singular fibers all of Kodaira type I_n.
Records.location: Eq. (1), Sec. Geometry of the Elliptic Fibration
